jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at FIITJEE
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FIITJEE. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About FIITJEE:
FIITJEE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE!
